message:
refactor(anthropic): replace hand-rolled retry loop with RetryLoop

Replace the manual retry loop in AnthropicClient::post() with the
shared RetryLoop::execute() from fcp-sdk::migration, using the
already-configured HttpRetryConfig and an ExecutionContext with a
120s request-scoped deadline.

The closure returns AttemptOutcome variants (Success, Retryable,
Terminal) to drive retry decisions, replacing the nested match
with explicit flow control. Retryable errors pass through
retry_after() for server-directed backoff.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
